/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libindustrial_calibration_core.so -o libindustrial_calibration_core.so CMakeFiles/industrial_calibration_core.dir/src/camera_intrinsics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/industrial_calibration_core.dir/src/dh_chain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/industrial_calibration_core.dir/src/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/industrial_calibration_core.dir/src/utils.cpp.o  -lyaml-cpp
